title: Combo_Spin per-blade A/B fade timing (L1)
goal: Combo_Spin 12.32 dB (spin geometry already SHIPPED 2026-07-16a, 11.21->12.32). REMAINING gap: the 6-blade counter-rotating pinwheel renders correctly but each blade's A/B fade-crossfade reveals B too early mid-transition (f08-f12 ~9 dB). NOT the spin geometry. Rule 10: fct minimize Combo_Spin -> diagnose the Fade timing window vs the actual GT per-blade crossfade. Headless reachable 14.54 (gap 3.33). DoD: f08-f12 up, gate net-positive.
